very_high.label: Very High
very_high.description: Near-identical function and sequence. Model organism findings highly predictive.

high.label: High
high.description: Strong conservation. Minor divergences unlikely to affect translational validity.

moderate.label: Moderate
moderate.description: Core function conserved but regulatory context or paralog number may differ.

low.label: Low
low.description: Functional analog exists but significant structural divergence. Use cautiously.

absent.label: Absent
absent.description: No functional homolog. Major translational gap. Do not extrapolate.

low.label: Low Risk
low.description: Model organism findings likely to translate.

moderate.label: Moderate Risk
moderate.description: Translate with caution — verify key divergences.

high.label: High Risk
high.description: Significant gap. Findings may not translate. Use alternative model.

critical.label: Critical Gap
critical.description: No meaningful model exists. Do not extrapolate — use organoids, iPSCs, or patient samples.

undergraduate.label: Undergraduate
undergraduate.description: Assumes basic genetics and cell biology
